name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl & Sopi operator backend — v5.50: product image review list is now persistent and exportable. clearedPct is stored per product, a review endpoint rebuilds the check/manual lists from stored state (so they survive a reload rather than living only in the last run report), the Settings panel shows them with thumbnails on a transparency checkerboard, and there is a CSV export with proper quoting for Icelandic names. Cumulative over v5.49.
